expectations.text: Clarifies that ISO 27701 is not a GDPR safe harbor
expectations.evidence: Keywords checked: ['not a safe harbor', 'not safe harbor', 'does not guarantee']... (not found enough)

expectations.text: Acknowledges that ISO 27701 can serve as positive evidence of compliance efforts
Identifies specific GDPR obligations not fully covered by ISO 27701
Addresses how supervisory authorities view ISO 27701 certification
Explains the limitations and gaps in ISO 27701 as a GDPR compliance tool
